-widget-container">

		<input onkeydown="return /[0-9]|\(|\)|\+|-|BACKSPACE/i.test(event.key)" type="hidden" class="phone_check" name="form_fields[whatsapp_check]" value="">

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1988d50 elementor-widget elementor-widget-html" data-id="1988d50" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="html.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<script>
document.getElementById('submitButton').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    var selectValue = document.querySelector('.elementor-field-group-faturamento select').value;

    if (
        selectValue === 'Abaixo de R$10 mil' ||
        selectValue === 'R$10 mil a R$30 mil'
    ) {
        document.querySelector('.elementor-field-group-url input').value = 'obrigado1';
    } else {
        document.querySelector('.elementor-field-group-url input').value = 'obrigado2';
    }
});
</script>				</div>
				</div>
					</div>
				</div>
				</div>
		<script type="speculationrules">
{"prefetch":[{"source":"document","where":{"and":[{"href_matches":"/*"},{"not":{"href_matches":["/wp-*.php","/wp-admin/*","/wp-content/uploads/*","/wp-content/*","/wp-content/plugins/*","/wp-content/themes/hello-elementor/*","/*\\?(.+)"]}},{"not":{"selector_matches":"a[rel~=\"nofollow\"]"}},{"not":{"selector_matches":".no-prefetch, .no-prefetch a"}}]},"eagerness":"conservative"}]}
</script>
<!-- HFCM by 99 Robots - Snippet # 8: Preenchimento -->
<script>
(function(){
  var UTM_KEYS = ['utm_source','utm_medium','utm_campaign','utm_term','utm_content'];

  // 1️⃣ Salva UTMs da URL em LocalStorage e Cookie
  function saveUtmsFromUrl(){
    try{
      var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      UTM_KEYS.forEach(function(k){
        var v = params.get(k);
        if(v){
          try{ localStorage.setItem(k, v); }catch(e){}
          try{ document.cookie = k + '=' + encodeURIComponent(v) + ';path=/;max-age=' + (60*60*24*30); }catch(e){}
        }
      });
    }catch(e){}
  }

  // 2️⃣ Lê UTMs de LocalStorage, Cookie ou URL
  function readUtms(){
    var utms = {};
    try{
      UTM_KEYS.forEach(function(k){
        var v = null;
        try{ v = localStorage.getItem(k); }catch(e){ v = null; }
        if(!v){
          var m = document.cookie.match(new RegExp('(?:^|; )' + k + '=([^;]+)'));
          if(m) v = decodeURIComponent(m[1]);
        }
        if(!v){
          var p = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
          var pv = p.get(k);
          if(pv) v = pv;
        }
        if(v) utms[k] = v;
      });
    }catch(e){}
    return utms;
  }

  // 3️⃣ Procura campo existente no formulário
  function findField(form, key){
    var sel1 = '[name="'+key+'"]';
    var sel2 = '[name="form_fields['+key+']"]';
    var sel3 = '#form-field-'+key;
    return form.querySelector(sel1) || form.querySelector(sel2) || form.querySelector(sel3) || null;
  }

  // 4️⃣ Preenche ou cria hidden input
  function fillOrCreate(form, utms){
    UTM_KEYS.forEach(function(k){
      if(!utms[k]) return;

      var existing = findField(form, k);
      if(existing){
        existing.value = utms[k];
        existing.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));
        existing.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));
      } else {
        // evita duplicação: checa se já existe hidden input
        var hiddenExists = form.querySelector('input[type="hidden"][name="'+k+'"]');
        if(!hiddenExists){
          var hf = document.createElement('input');
          hf.type = 'hidden';
          hf.name = k;
          hf.value = utms[k];
          form.appendChild(hf);
        }
      }
    });
  }

  // 5️⃣ Opcional: adiciona UTMs na URL de redirect
  function addUtmsToRedirect(form, utms){
    var redirectField = form.querySelector('input[name="_redirect_url"], input[name="redirect_to"], input[name="redirect"]');
    if(!redirectField) return;

    try{
      var url = new URL(redirectField.value, window.location.origin);
      UTM_KEYS.forEach(function(k){
        if(utms[k]) url.searchParams.set(k, utms[k]);
      });
      redirectField.value = url.toString();
    }catch(e){}
  }

  // 6️⃣ Inicialização
  function init(){
    saveUtmsFromUrl();
    var utms = readUtms();

    // Preenche formulários existentes
    var forms = document.querySelectorAll('form.elementor-form, form');
    Array.prototype.forEach.call(forms, function(f){
      fillOrCreate(f, utms);
      addUtmsToRedirect(f, utms);
    });

    // Observa DOM para formularios dinâmicos
    var mo = new MutationObserver(function(){
      var formsNow = document.querySelectorAll('form.elementor-form, form');
      Array.prototype.forEach.call(formsNow, function(f){
        fillOrCreate(f, readUtms());
        addUtmsToRedirect(f, readUtms());
      });
    });
    mo.observe(document.body, {childList:true, subtree:true});

    // Antes do submit: garante UTMs atualizadas
    document.body.addEventListener('submit', function(e){
      var form = e.target;
      if(!form || form.tagName.toLowerCase() !== 'form') return;
      var ut = readUtms();
      fillOrCreate(form, ut);
      addUtmsToRedirect(form, ut);
    }, true);
  }

  if(document.readyState !== 'loading') init();
  else document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
})();
</script>

<!-- /end HFCM by 99 Robots -->
<!-- HFCM by 99 Robots - Snippet # 9: Failsafe -->
<script>
(function(){
  var UTM_KEYS = ['utm_source','utm_medium','utm_campaign','utm_term','utm_content'];

  function readUtms(){
    var utms = {};
    try{
      UTM_KEYS.forEach(function(k){
        var v = null;
        try{ v = localStorage.getItem(k); }catch(e){ v = null; }
        if(!v){
          var m = document.cookie.match(new RegExp('(?:^|; )' + k + '=([^;]+)'));
          if(m) v = decodeURIComponent(m[1]);
        }
        if(v) utms[k] = v;
      });
      // se vazio, pega da URL
      if(Object.keys(utms).length === 0){
        var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
        UTM_KEYS.forEach(function(k){
          var v = params.get(k);
          if(v) utms[k] = v;
        });
      }
    }catch(e){}
    return utms;
  }

  function utmsToQuery(utms){
    var p = new URLSearchParams();
    UTM_KEYS.forEach(function(k){
      if(utms[k]) p.set(k, utms[k]);
    });
    var s = p.toString();
    return s ? ('?' + s) : '';
  }

  function fillFields(utms, root){
    root = root || document;
    UTM_KEYS.forEach(function(k){
      var v = utms[k];
      if(!v) return;
      var sel = 'input[name="'+k+'"], textarea[name="'+k+'"], input#'+k+', textarea#'+k;
      Array.prototype.forEach.call(root.querySelectorAll(sel), function(el){
        el.value = v;
        el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));
        el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));
      });
    });
  }

  function onSubmitEnsure(event){
    try{
      var form = event.target;
      if(!form || form.tagName.toLowerCase()!=='form') return;
      // limitar a forms do Elementor (ajustável)
      if(!form.classList || !form.classList.contains('elementor-form')) return;

      var utms = readUtms();
      // cria/atualiza hidden inputs
      UTM_KEYS.forEach(function(k){
        if(!utms[k]) return;
        var existing = form.querySelector('input[name="'+k+'"], textarea[name="'+k+'"]');
        if(existing) existing.value = utms[k];
        else {
          var hf = document.createElement('input');
          hf.type = 'hidden'; hf.name = k; hf.value = utms[k];
          form.appendChild(hf);
        }
      });

      // ajustar redirect se existir (_redirect_url ou redirect_to)
      var redirectField = form.querySelector('input[name="_redirect_url"], input[name="redirect_to"], input[name="redirect"]');
      var redirectUrl = redirectField ? redirectField.value : (form.dataset && form.dataset.redirectUrl ? form.dataset.redirectUrl : null);
      if(redirectUrl){
        var q = utmsToQuery(utms).replace(/^\?/,'');
        if(q){
          var newUrl = redirectUrl + (redirectUrl.indexOf('?')>-1 ? '&' : '?') + q;
          if(redirectField) redirectField.value = newUrl;
          else {
            var hf = document.createElement('input');
            hf.type = 'hidden'; hf.name = '_redirect_url'; hf.value = newUrl;
            form.appendChild(hf);
          }
        }
      } else {
        try{ sessionStorage.setItem('__utm_redirect_query', utmsToQuery(utms)); }catch(e){}
      }
    }catch(err){}
  }

  // init
  function init(){
    var utms = readUtms();
    fillFields(utms, document);
    var obs = new MutationObserver(function(){ fillFields(readUtms(), document); });
    obs.observe(document.body, {childList:true, subtree:true});
    // garante antes do submit
    document.body.addEventListener('submit', onSubmitEnsure, true);
  }

  if(document.readyState !== 'loading') init();
  else document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);

})();
</script>
<!-- /end HFCM by 99 Robots -->

e(this.elements.$swiperContainer,this.getSwiperSettings()),this.elements.$swiperContainer.data("swiper",this.swiper)}bindEvents(){this.elements.$swiperArrows.on("keydown",this.onDirectionArrowKeydown.bind(this)),this.elements.$paginationWrapper.on("keydown",".swiper-pagination-bullet",this.onDirectionArrowKeydown.bind(this)),this.elements.$swiperContainer.on("keydown",".swiper-slide",this.onDirectionArrowKeydown.bind(this)),this.$element.find(":focusable").on("focus",this.onFocusDisableAutoplay.bind(this)),elementorFrontend.elements.$window.on("resize",this.getSwiperSettings.bind(this))}unbindEvents(){this.elements.$swiperArrows.off(),this.elements.$paginationWrapper.off(),this.elements.$swiperContainer.off(),this.$element.find(":focusable").off(),elementorFrontend.elements.$window.off("resize")}onDirectionArrowKeydown(e){const t=elementorFrontend.config.is_rtl,r=e.originalEvent.code,n=t?"ArrowLeft":"ArrowRight";if(!(-1!==["ArrowLeft","ArrowRight"].indexOf(r)))return!0;(t?"ArrowRight":"ArrowLeft")===r?this.swiper.slidePrev():n===r&&this.swiper.slideNext()}onFocusDisableAutoplay(){this.swiper.autoplay.stop()}updateSwiperOption(e){const t=this.getElementSettings()[e],r=this.swiper.params;switch(e){case"autoplay_speed":r.autoplay.delay=t;break;case"speed":r.speed=t}this.swiper.update()}getChangeableProperties(){return{pause_on_hover:"pauseOnHover",autoplay_speed:"delay",speed:"speed",arrows_position:"arrows_position"}}onElementChange(e){if(0===e.indexOf("image_spacing_custom"))return void this.updateSpaceBetween(e);if(this.getChangeableProperties()[e])if("pause_on_hover"===e){const e=this.getElementSettings("pause_on_hover");this.togglePauseOnHover("yes"===e)}else this.updateSwiperOption(e)}onEditSettingsChange(e){"activeItemIndex"===e&&this.swiper.slideToLoop(this.getEditSettings("activeItemIndex")-1)}getSpaceBetween(e=null){const t=elementorFrontend.utils.controls.getResponsiveControlValue(this.getElementSettings(),"image_spacing_custom","size",e);return Number(t)||0}updateSpaceBetween(e){const e=this.swiper?.params?.pagination.bulletClass,t=this.swiper?.params?.pagination.bulletActiveClass;this.getPaginationBullets().forEach(e=>{e.classList?.contains(t)||e.removeAttribute("tabindex")});const r="ArrowLeft"===event?.code||"ArrowRight"===event?.code;event?.target?.classList?.contains(e)&&r&&this.$element.find(`.${t}`).trigger("focus")}getSwiperWrapperTranformXValue(){let e=this.elements.$swiperWrapper[0]?.style.transform;return e=e.replace("translate3d(",""),e=e.split(","),e=parseInt(e[0].replace("px","")),e||0}a11ySetSlideAriaHidden(e=""){if("number"!=typeof("initialisation"===e?0:this.swiper?.activeIndex))return;const t=this.getSwiperWrapperTranformXValue(),r=this.elements.$swiperWrapper[0].clientWidth;this.elements.$swiperContainer.find(this.getSettings("selectors").slideContent).each((e,n)=>{0<=n.offsetLeft+t&&r>n.offsetLeft+t?(n.removeAttribute("aria-hidden"),n.removeAttribute("inert")):(n.setAttribute("aria-hidden",!0),n.setAttribute("inert",""))})}handleElementHandlers(){}}t.default=CarouselHandlerBase},9655:(e,t,r)=>{"use strict";r(9930)},9930:(e,t,r)=>{"use strict";var e.filter(e=>t===e.type).sort((e,t)=>e.scrollPosition-t.scrollPosition)}isValidSelector(e){return/^#[A-Za-z_][\w-]*$/.test(e)}getAnchorTarget(e){const t=e?.hash;return this.isValidSelector(t)?document.querySelector(t):null}getElementSettings(e){return JSON.parse(e.getAttribute("data-settings"))}}t.default=_default}},e=>{e.O(0,[941],()=>{return t=7603,e(e.s=t);var t});e.O()}]);
</script>
